channel.title: National Instruments — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by National Instruments (ni).

item.title: CVE-2026-8036 · 8.4 HIGH — Local privilege escalation in NI-PAL
item.description: Improper input validation in NI-PAL may allow a local authenticated user to access arbitrary system memory, potentially leading to privilege escalation. This vulnerability affects NI-PAL 26.3.0 and prior versions on Windows and Linux.

item.title: CVE-2026-8035 · 7.1 HIGH — NULL pointer dereference in NI-PAL
item.description: Improper input validation in the NI-PAL kernel driver may allow a local authenticated user to cause a denial of service by triggering a crash due to a NULL pointer dereference. This vulnerability affects NI-PAL 26.3.0 and prior versions on Windows an…

item.title: CVE-2026-9051 · 9.3 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Authentication Bypass Vulnerability in NI SystemLink Enterprise
item.description: There is an authentication bypass vulnerability in the NI SystemLink Enterprise Dashboard application that may allow an unauthenticated remote attacker to bypass authentication controls leading to privilege escalation or information disclosure. Succe…

item.title: CVE-2026-32864 · 8.5 HIGH — Out-of-Bounds Read in mgcore_SH_25_3!aligned_free()
item.description: There is a memory corruption vulnerability due to an out-of-bounds read in mgcore_SH_25_3!aligned_free() in NI LabVIEW. This vulnerability may result in information disclosure or arbitrary code execution. Successful exploitation requires an attacker…

item.title: CVE-2026-32863 · 8.5 HIGH — Out-of-Bounds Read in sentry_transaction_context_set_operation()
item.description: There is a memory corruption vulnerability due to an out-of-bounds read in sentry_transaction_context_set_operation() in NI LabVIEW. This vulnerability may result in information disclosure or arbitrary code execution. Successful exploitation requires…

item.title: CVE-2026-32862 · 8.5 HIGH — Out-of-Bounds Write in ResFileFactory::InitResourceMgr()
item.description: There is a memory corruption vulnerability due to an out-of-bounds write in ResFileFactory::InitResourceMgr() in NI LabVIEW. This vulnerability may result in information disclosure or arbitrary code execution. Successful exploitation requires an atta…

item.title: CVE-2026-32861 · 8.5 HIGH — Out-of-Bounds Write Vulnerability in NI LabVIEW when loading lvclass file
item.description: There is a memory corruption vulnerability due to an out-of-bounds write when loading a corrupted LVCLASS file in NI LabVIEW. This vulnerability may result in information disclosure or arbitrary code execution. Successful exploitation requires an att…

item.title: CVE-2026-32860 · 8.5 HIGH — Out-of-Bounds Write Vulnerability in NI LabVIEW when loading lvlib file
item.description: There is a memory corruption vulnerability due to an out-of-bounds write when loading a corrupted LVLIB file in NI LabVIEW. This vulnerability may result in information disclosure or arbitrary code execution. Successful exploitation requires an attac…

item.title: CVE-2026-0956 · 8.5 HIGH — Out-Of-Bounds Read in Digilent DASYLab
item.description: There is a memory corruption vulnerability due to an out-of-bounds read when loading a corrupted file in Digilent DASYLab. This vulnerability may result in information disclosure or arbitrary code execution. Successful exploitation requires an attack…

item.title: CVE-2026-0955 · 8.5 HIGH — Out-Of-Bounds Read When Opening a Corrupt File in Digilent DASYLab
item.description: There is a memory corruption vulnerability due to an out-of-bounds read when loading a corrupted file in Digilent DASYLab. This vulnerability may result in information disclosure or arbitrary code execution. Successful exploitation requires an attack…

item.description: There is a memory corruption vulnerability due to an out-of-bounds write when loading a corrupted file in Digilent DASYLab. This vulnerability may result in information disclosure or arbitrary code execution. Successful exploitation requires an attac…

item.title: CVE-2026-0954 · 8.5 HIGH — Out-Of-Bounds Write When Opening a Corrupt DSB File in Digilent DASYLab
item.description: There is a memory corruption vulnerability due to an out-of-bounds write when loading a corrupted DSB file in Digilent DASYLab. This vulnerability may result in information disclosure or arbitrary code execution. Successful exploitation requires an a…

item.title: CVE-2025-64469 · 8.5 HIGH — Stack-based Buffer Overflow in LVResource::DetachResource() in NI LabVIEW
item.description: There is a stack-based buffer overflow vulnerability in NI LabVIEW in LVResFile::FindRsrcListEntry() when parsing a corrupted VI file. This vulnerability may result in information disclosure or arbitrary code execution. Successful exploitation requir…

item.title: CVE-2025-64468 · 8.5 HIGH — Use-after-Free in sentry!sentry_span_set_data() in NI LabVIEW
item.description: There is a use-after-free vulnerability in sentry!sentry_span_set_data() when parsing a corrupted VI file. This vulnerability may result in information disclosure or arbitrary code execution. Successful exploitation requires an attacker to get a user…

item.title: CVE-2025-64467 · 8.5 HIGH — Out-of-Bounds Read in LVResFile::FindRsrcListEntry() in NI LabVIEW
item.description: There is an out of bounds read vulnerability in NI LabVIEW in LVResFile::FindRsrcListEntry() when parsing a corrupted VI file. This vulnerability may result in information disclosure or arbitrary code execution. Successful exploitation requires an at…

item.title: CVE-2025-64466 · 8.5 HIGH — Out-of-Bounds Read in lvre!ExecPostedProcRecPost() in NI LabVIEW
item.description: There is an out of bounds read vulnerability in NI LabVIEW in lvre!ExecPostedProcRecPost() when parsing a corrupted VI file. This vulnerability may result in information disclosure or arbitrary code execution. Successful exploitation requires an atta…

item.description: There is an out of bounds read vulnerability in NI LabVIEW in lvre!DataSizeTDR() when parsing a corrupted VI file. This vulnerability may result in information disclosure or arbitrary code execution. Successful exploitation requires an attacker to ge…

item.description: There is an out of bounds read vulnerability in NI LabVIEW in lvre!VisaWriteFromFile() when parsing a corrupted VI file. This vulnerability may result in information disclosure or arbitrary code execution. Successful exploitation requires an attacker…

item.description: There is an out of bounds read vulnerability in NI LabVIEW in LVResource::DetachResource() when parsing a corrupted VI file. This vulnerability may result in information disclosure or arbitrary code execution. Successful exploitation requires an atta…

item.title: CVE-2025-64462 · 8.5 HIGH — Out-of-Bounds Read in LVResFile::RGetMemFileHandle() in NI LabVIEW
item.description: There is an out of bounds read vulnerability in NI LabVIEW in LVResFile::RGetMemFileHandle() when parsing a corrupted VI file. This vulnerability may result in information disclosure or arbitrary code execution. Successful exploitation requires an at…

item.title: CVE-2025-64461 · 8.5 HIGH — Out of Bounds Write in mgocre_SH_25_3!RevBL() in NI LabVIEW
item.description: There is an out of bounds write vulnerability in NI LabVIEW in mgocre_SH_25_3!RevBL() when parsing a corrupted VI file. This vulnerability may result in information disclosure or arbitrary code execution. Successful exploitation requires an attacker…

item.title: CVE-2025-12097 · 8.7 HIGH 🌩️ — Relative Path Traversal Vulnerability in NI System Web Server
item.description: There is a relative path traversal vulnerability in the NI System Web Server that may result in information disclosure. Successful exploitation requires an attacker to send a specially crafted request to the NI System Web Server, allowing the attacke…

item.title: CVE-2025-6034 · 8.5 HIGH — Out of Bounds Read in DefaultFontOptions() in NI Circuit Design Suite
item.description: There is a memory corruption vulnerability due to an out of bounds read in DefaultFontOptions() when using SymbolEditor in NI Circuit Design Suite. This vulnerability may result in information disclosure or arbitrary code execution. Successful exploi…

item.title: CVE-2025-6033 · 8.5 HIGH — Memory Corruption issue in XML_Serialize() in NI Circuit Design Suite
item.description: There is a memory corruption vulnerability due to an out of bounds write in XML_Serialize() when using SymbolEditor in NI Circuit Design Suite. This vulnerability may result in information disclosure or arbitrary code execution. Successful exploitati…

item.title: CVE-2025-10203 · 8.5 HIGH — Relative Path Traversal Vulnerability in Digilent WaveForms
item.description: Relative path traversal vulnerability due to improper input validation in Digilent WaveForms that may result in arbitrary code execution. Successful exploitation requires an attacker to get a user to open a specially crafted .DWF3WORK file. This vuln…

item.title: CVE-2025-57777 · 8.5 HIGH — Out Of Bounds Write in displ2.dll when parsing a DSB file with Digilent DASYLab
item.description: There is an out of bounds write vulnerability due to improper bounds checking in displ2.dll when parsing a DSB file with Digilent DASYLab. This vulnerability may result in arbitrary code execution. Successful exploitation requires an attacker to get…

item.title: CVE-2025-57775 · 8.5 HIGH — Heap-based Buffer Overflow when parsing a DSB file with Digilent DASYLab
item.description: There is a heap-based Buffer Overflow vulnerability due to improper bounds checking when parsing a DSB file with Digilent DASYLab. This vulnerability may result in arbitrary code execution. Successful exploitation requires an attacker to get a user t…

item.title: CVE-2025-9188 · 8.5 HIGH — Deserialization of Untrusted Data when parsing a DSB file with Digilent DASYLab
item.description: There is a deserialization of untrusted data vulnerability in Digilent DASYLab. This vulnerability may result in arbitrary code execution. Successful exploitation requires an attacker to get a user to open a specially crafted DSB file. The vulnerabil…

item.title: CVE-2025-57778 · 8.5 HIGH — Out Of Bounds Write to invalid source address when parsing a DSB file with Digilent DASYLab
item.description: There is an out of bounds write vulnerability due to improper bounds checking resulting in an invalid source address when parsing a DSB file with Digilent DASYLab. This vulnerability may result in arbitrary code execution. Successful exploitation req…

item.title: CVE-2025-57776 · 8.5 HIGH — Out Of Bounds Write to invalid address when parsing a DSB file with Digilent DASYLab
item.description: There is an out of bounds write vulnerability due to improper bounds checking resulting in an invalid address when parsing a DSB file with Digilent DASYLab. This vulnerability may result in arbitrary code execution. Successful exploitation requires a…

item.title: CVE-2025-57774 · 8.5 HIGH — Out Of Bounds Write of invalid data when parsing a DSB file with Digilent DASYLab
item.description: There is an out of bounds write vulnerability due to improper bounds checking resulting in invalid data when parsing a DSB file with Digilent DASYLab. This vulnerability may result in arbitrary code execution. Successful exploitation requires an atta…

item.title: CVE-2025-9189 · 8.5 HIGH — Out Of Bounds Write when parsing a DSB file with Digilent DASYLab
item.description: There is an out of bounds write vulnerability due to improper bounds checking resulting in a large destination address when parsing a DSB file with Digilent DASYLab. This vulnerability may result in arbitrary code execution. Successful exploitation r…

item.title: CVE-2025-7849 · 8.5 HIGH — Memory Corruption Issue in NI LabVIEW due to improper error handling
item.description: A memory corruption vulnerability due to improper error handling when a VILinkObj is null exists in NI LabVIEW that may result in arbitrary code execution. Successful exploitation requires an attacker to get a user to open a specially crafted VI. Thi…

item.title: CVE-2025-7848 · 8.5 HIGH — Missing input check in lvpict.cpp used in NI LabVIEW
item.description: A memory corruption vulnerability due to improper input validation in lvpict.cpp exists in NI LabVIEW that may result in arbitrary code execution. Successful exploitation requires an attacker to get a user to open a specially crafted VI. This vulnera…

item.title: CVE-2025-7361 · 8.5 HIGH — Code Injection Vulnerability in NI LabVIEW when using CIN nodes
item.description: A code injection vulnerability due to an improper initialization check exists in NI LabVIEW that may result in arbitrary code execution. Successful exploitation requires an attacker to get a user to open a specially crafted VI using a CIN node. This…

item.title: CVE-2025-2634 · 7.8 HIGH — Out of Bounds Read Vulnerability in NI LabVIEW when building font map
item.description: Out of bounds read vulnerability due to improper bounds checking in NI LabVIEW in fontmgr may result in information disclosure or arbitrary code execution. Successful exploitation requires an attacker to get a user to open a specially crafted VI. Thi…

item.description: Out of bounds read vulnerability due to improper bounds checking in NI LabVIEW in lvre!UDecStrToNum that may result in information disclosure or arbitrary code execution. Successful exploitation requires an attacker to get a user to open a specially…

item.title: CVE-2025-30421 · 8.5 HIGH — Stack-based Buffer Overflow in DrObjectStorage::XML_Serialize() in NI Circuit Design Suite
item.description: There is a memory corruption vulnerability due to a stack-based buffer overflow in DrObjectStorage::XML_Serialize() when using the SymbolEditor in NI Circuit Design Suite. This vulnerability may result in information disclosure or arbitrary code exec…

item.title: CVE-2025-30420 · 8.5 HIGH — Out of Bounds Read in Bitmap::InternalDraw() in NI Circuit Design Suite
item.description: There is a memory corruption vulnerability due to an out of bounds read in Bitmap::InternalDraw() when using the SymbolEditor in NI Circuit Design Suite. This vulnerability may result in information disclosure or arbitrary code execution. Successful…

item.title: CVE-2025-30419 · 8.5 HIGH — Out of Bounds Read in GetSymbolBorderRectSize() in NI Circuit Design Suite
item.description: There is a memory corruption vulnerability due to an out of bounds read in GetSymbolBorderRectSize() when using the SymbolEditor in NI Circuit Design Suite. This vulnerability may result in information disclosure or arbitrary code execution. Successf…

item.title: CVE-2025-30418 · 8.5 HIGH — Out of Bounds Write in CheckPins() in NI Circuit Design Suite
item.description: There is a memory corruption vulnerability due to an out of bounds write in CheckPins() when using the SymbolEditor in NI Circuit Design Suite. This vulnerability may result in information disclosure or arbitrary code execution. Successful exploitati…

item.title: CVE-2025-30417 · 8.5 HIGH — Out of Bounds Write in Library!DecodeBase64() in NI Circuit Design Suite
item.description: There is a memory corruption vulnerability due to an out of bounds write in Library!DecodeBase64() when using the SymbolEditor in NI Circuit Design Suite. This vulnerability may result in information disclosure or arbitrary code execution. Successful…

item.title: CVE-2025-2632 · 8.5 HIGH — Out of Bounds Write Vulnerability in NI LabVIEW reading CPU info from cache
item.description: Out of bounds write vulnerability due to improper bounds checking in NI LabVIEW reading CPU info from cache that may result in information disclosure or arbitrary code execution. Successful exploitation requires an attacker to get a user to open a sp…

item.title: CVE-2025-2631 · 8.5 HIGH — Out of Bounds Write Vulnerability in NI LabVIEW in InitCPUInformation()
item.description: Out of bounds write vulnerability due to improper bounds checking in NI LabVIEW in InitCPUInformation() that may result in information disclosure or arbitrary code execution. Successful exploitation requires an attacker to get a user to open a specia…

item.title: CVE-2025-2630 · 7.3 HIGH — DLL Hijacking Vulnerability in NI LabVIEW
item.description: There is a DLL hijacking vulnerability due to an uncontrolled search path that exists in NI LabVIEW. This vulnerability may result in arbitrary code execution. Successful exploitation requires an attacker to insert a malicious DLL into the uncontroll…

item.title: CVE-2025-2629 · 7.3 HIGH — DLL Hijacking Vulnerability in NI LabVIEW When Loading NI Error Reporting
item.description: There is a DLL hijacking vulnerability due to an uncontrolled search path that exists in NI LabVIEW when loading NI Error Reporting. This vulnerability may result in arbitrary code execution. Successful exploitation requires an attacker to insert a m…

item.title: CVE-2024-12742 · 8.4 HIGH — Deserialization of Untrusted Data Vulnerability in NI G Web Development Software
item.description: A deserialization of untrusted data vulnerability exists in NI G Web Development Software that may result in arbitrary code execution. Successful exploitation requires an attacker to get a user to open a specially crafted project file. This vulnerabi…

item.title: CVE-2024-12740 · 7.8 HIGH — Dependency on Vulnerable Third-Party Component exposes Vulnerabilities in NI Vision Software
item.description: Vision related software from NI used a third-party library for image processing that exposes several vulnerabilities. These vulnerabilities may result in arbitrary code execution. Successful exploitation requires an attacker to get a user to open a s…

item.title: CVE-2024-12741 · 8.4 HIGH 👻 — Deserialization Of Untrusted Data Vulnerability In NI DAQExpress Project File
item.description: A deserialization of untrusted data vulnerability exists in NI DAQExpress that may result in remote code execution. Successful exploitation requires an attacker to get a user to open a specially crafted project file. This vulnerability affects DAQExp…

item.title: CVE-2024-10496 · 8.4 HIGH — Out of bounds read in BuildFontMap in fontmgr.cpp in NI LabVIEW
item.description: An out of bounds read due to improper input validation in BuildFontMap in fontmgr.cpp in NI LabVIEW may disclose information or result in arbitrary code execution. Successful exploitation requires an attacker to provide a user with a specially crafte…
